CIPHER.430.cipherString: Every country can be defined through their food, their music and their language. That's the soul of a country.
CIPHER.430.question: Quincy Jones offers an observation that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.430.author: Quincy Jones

CIPHER.421.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote, written in a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 105 7896 4236 decode to?

CIPHER.410.cipherString: Men think they are quarrelling with one another, and both sides feel that they are in the wrong.
CIPHER.410.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Aristocrat encoded quote by Goethe using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.410.author: Goethe

CIPHER.403.cipherString: The more you are in this business, the more humbled by it you become.
CIPHER.403.question: This coded note is discovered inside a sealed envelope labeled “Confidential.” It's a quote by Meryl Streep, encoded using a Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword length of 5. The 22nd through 31st cipher units (54 36 38 34 77 54 58 48 34 46) decode to be SINESSTHEM. What does it say?
CIPHER.403.author: Meryl Streep

CIPHER.424.cipherString: Time is the single most important resource that we have. Every single minute we lose is never coming back.
CIPHER.424.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Aristocrat puzzle by Tarun Sharma using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.424.author: Tarun Sharma

CIPHER.423.cipherString: No government agrees with another government on everything.
CIPHER.423.question: Kenneth Francis Hackett offers us some advice that has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of EMPATHY and Polybius key of NEIGHBORS. What does it say?
CIPHER.423.author: Kenneth Francis Hackett

CIPHER.414.cipherString: The biggest problem is people are afraid of poetry, think they can't understand it or that it will be boring.
CIPHER.414.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book is this Aristocrat encoded quote by Caroline Kennedy. You are told that the cipher contains the word IT twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.414.author: Caroline Kennedy

CIPHER.413.cipherString: What you perceive as a failure today may actually be a crucial step towards the success you seek. Never give up.
CIPHER.413.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Complete Columnar puzzle reveals a quote by Richelle E. Goodrich. The quote has RETODA somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.413.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

CIPHER.429.cipherString: Dad and mom would have preferred that I be a doctor, a lawyer, a scientist, or a great humanitarian.
CIPHER.429.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by Levon Helm, written as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.429.author: Levon Helm

CIPHER.427.cipherString: That is the great difficulty in not having an opening speech. If there is a speech without any observations, I think it beneficial.
CIPHER.427.question: Your school's intercom crackled to life with static… then spelled out this Patristocrat message by J. Parke using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher ends with IAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.427.author: J. Parke

CIPHER.416.cipherString: Divine love is a sacred flower, which in its early bud is happiness, and in its full bloom is heaven.
CIPHER.416.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Hervey, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. You are told that the cipher contains the word IN twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.416.author: Hervey

CIPHER.415.cipherString: May all eventually settle in the valley of wisdom.
CIPHER.415.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by Richard Rensberry, encoded using a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.415.author: Richard Rensberry

CIPHER.422.cipherString: A relationship is like another job, you know, you have to work at it all the time.
CIPHER.422.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote by Candice Swanepoel, encrypted using a Checkerboard. The deciphered text starts with ARELATIONS. What does it say?
CIPHER.422.author: Candice Swanepoel

CIPHER.418.cipherString: Reality did not take long to intrude.
CIPHER.418.question: Hidden in the margin of a library book on black holes: decode this Baconian version of Niall Ferguson. You are told that the deciphered text starts with REAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.418.author: Niall Ferguson

CIPHER.405.cipherString: Business is the art of making money by selling things or services people want for more than their cost.
CIPHER.405.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Patrick Dixon, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has MONE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.405.author: Patrick Dixon

CIPHER.426.cipherString: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it.
CIPHER.426.question: You find a coded sequence scratched into the surface of a lab stool. It turns out to be a quote by Gemstone, written in a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.426.author: Gemstone

CIPHER.404.cipherString: We know that he has, more than any other man, the gift of compressing the largest number of words into the smallest amount of thought.
CIPHER.404.question: This coded passage was discovered in the margin of a math exam from years ago. It's a quote by Winston Churchill, encrypted as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher starts with WEK. What does it say?
CIPHER.404.author: Winston Churchill

CIPHER.406.cipherString: Power always thinks it has a great soul and vast views beyond the comprehension of the weak.
CIPHER.406.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by John Adams encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.406.author: John Adams

CIPHER.428.cipherString: Without big data, you are blind and deaf and in the middle of a freeway.
CIPHER.428.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Geoffrey Moore encoded as a Porta using a keyword of ALBUMS. What does it say?
CIPHER.428.author: Geoffrey Moore

CIPHER.412.cipherString: Siempre son los aventureros los que hacen grandes cosas, no los soberanos de los grandes imperios.
CIPHER.412.question: You intercept a mysterious radio signal. Decoding it reveals a quote by Montesquieu in Spanish encrypted as a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.412.author: Montesquieu
CIPHER.412.translation: It is always adventurers who do great things, not the sovereigns of great empires.

CIPHER.411.cipherString: The beginning of thought is in disagreement -- not only with others but also with ourselves.
CIPHER.411.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this Checkerboard string by Eric Hoffer with a Polybius key of OBSERVING. What does it say?
CIPHER.411.author: Eric Hoffer

CIPHER.419.cipherString: Each separate star seems nothing, but a myriad scattered stars break up the night and make it beautiful.
CIPHER.419.question: While repairing an old telescope, you find a note hidden in the tube. The message is a quote written in an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?

CIPHER.401.question: Found inside a dissected frog's stomach (plastic, don’t worry): this Hill encoded note by David Lean using a keyword of NEXT. What does it say?
CIPHER.401.author: David Lean

CIPHER.420.cipherString: Economy forced me to become a vegetarian, but I finally starting liking it.
CIPHER.420.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by A.P.J. Abdul Kalam, encrypted with a Porta. The 17th through 23rd cipher characters (FXUWION) decode to be OBECOME. What does it say?
CIPHER.420.author: A.P.J. Abdul Kalam

CIPHER.409.question: Your drone photographed some weird markings in a parking lot. Turns out it's a quote in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 4012 67822 9255 1236 decode to?

CIPHER.417.cipherString: I think as a kid I never really understood the magnitude of a hurricane and what it could do.
CIPHER.417.question: A vending machine just dispensed a candy wrapper with this Checkerboard code by Marshall Faulk with a Polybius key of MARVELOUS. What does it say?
CIPHER.417.author: Marshall Faulk

CIPHER.407.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Hill encoded quote by Erica Jong with a keyword of PROVISION. What does it say?
CIPHER.407.author: Erica Jong

CIPHER.402.cipherString: Los amigos se revelan unos a otros con la mayor claridad exactamente aquello sobre lo que callan.
CIPHER.402.question: Someone has left a coded message on the classroom 3D printer's display. You’re told it's a quote by Goethe in Spanish, written in a Xenocrypt Cipher using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.402.author: Goethe
CIPHER.402.translation: Friends reveal to each other most clearly exactly that upon which they are silent.

CIPHER.425.cipherString: How much the sea became very small, when the first ship sailed.
CIPHER.425.question: You came across the following written on a wall in a cave. You are told that it's a quote by Mohamed Ismail encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of STAR and Polybius key of COMPLEXITY. What does it say?
CIPHER.425.author: Mohamed Ismail

CIPHER.408.cipherString: For wolves and pigs and bears, thinking that they are human is a tragedy. For a cat, its an experience.
CIPHER.408.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by Witches Abroad, written in an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. What was the K2 Key Phrase used to encode it?
CIPHER.408.author: Witches Abroad
